hero.title: Strengthening Cancer Care Across Africa
hero.subtitle: Building capacity, raising awareness, and fostering partnerships for better cancer prevention, detection, and treatment.

about.title: Driven By Purpose And Impact
about.subtitle: Building a future where quality cancer care is accessible to all Africans through training, awareness, and partnerships.
about.missionTitle: Together for Lasting Hope and Health
about.missionText: Cancer Care Africa Foundation (CanCAF) is committed to strengthening cancer control systems across Africa through capacity building, awareness, advocacy, policy engagement, and strategic partnerships to improve prevention, early detection, treatment, and survivorship.
about.visionTitle: Quality Cancer Care for All Africans
about.visionText: A future where every person in Africa has access to quality cancer prevention, early detection, treatment, and compassionate care.
about.whereWeWorkText: CanCAF operates across Africa through strategic partnerships with health institutions, governments, and organisations committed to improving cancer care. Our reach continues to expand as we work together to strengthen cancer control systems continent-wide.

values.compassionDesc: We serve with empathy, dignity, and respect.
values.equityDesc: We promote fair access to quality cancer care.
values.impactDesc: We are committed to lasting change.

programs.title: Transforming Cancer Care Across Africa
programs.subtitle: Strategic initiatives driving meaningful change in cancer prevention, detection, and treatment.
programs.capacityBuildingDesc: CanCAF provides training and professional development opportunities for healthcare providers and institutions to enhance cancer prevention, diagnosis, treatment, and care delivery. Our programs support workforce development and strengthen institutional capacity across Africa.
programs.awarenessDesc: We conduct community outreach and public education initiatives to increase awareness about cancer prevention, early detection, and treatment. Our awareness programs aim to reduce stigma and encourage timely health-seeking behaviour.
programs.earlyDetectionDesc: CanCAF supports initiatives that promote early diagnosis through screening education, referral pathways, and collaboration with healthcare facilities and stakeholders.
programs.advocacyDesc: We support evidence-informed advocacy and policy dialogue to strengthen cancer control strategies and improve access to affordable cancer services across Africa.
programs.partnershipsDesc: We work with governments, health institutions, civil society organisations, and international partners to advance comprehensive cancer control and strengthen health systems.

partners.title: Building Together For Greater Impact
partners.subtitle: Collaborating with leading organizations to strengthen cancer care systems across the continent.
partners.policyDesc: We contribute to evidence-informed policy dialogue and stakeholder engagement to strengthen national and regional cancer control efforts.
partners.systemsDesc: We collaborate with governments, health institutions, and development partners to build sustainable and coordinated cancer care systems.
partners.joinUs: Join us in strengthening cancer care across Africa.
partners.networkPartners: Network of partners committed to change
partners.welcomeText: Organizations committed to improving cancer care across Africa can join our growing network.
partners.welcomeCollaborationLong: We welcome collaboration with organizations across sectors who share our commitment to cancer control in Africa.

news.title: Stories Of Hope And Progress
news.subtitle: Stay updated with our latest initiatives, events, and impact stories from across Africa.

contact.title: Let's Connect And Make A Difference
contact.subtitle: We would love to hear from you. Reach out to us anytime.
contact.name: Your Name
contact.subject: Subject

donate.title: Your Support Powers Life-Changing Missions
donate.subtitle: Every contribution helps us build stronger cancer care systems and save lives across Africa.
donate.makeDifferenceText: Every contribution, no matter the size, helps us train healthcare professionals, support early detection programs, and advocate for better cancer care policies across Africa.
donate.trainingMaterials: Provides training materials for one healthcare worker

footer.tagline: Strengthening cancer care capacity across Africa.

focusAreas.title: Comprehensive Cancer Control
focusAreas.subtitle: We work across the cancer care continuum to build stronger health systems in Africa.
focusAreas.capacityDesc: Training healthcare workers and strengthening institutions.
focusAreas.awarenessDesc: Community outreach and public education initiatives.
focusAreas.earlyDesc: Supporting screening programs and referral pathways.

impact.title: Cancer in Africa: A Growing Crisis That Demands Action
impact.newCasesDesc: New cancer cases diagnosed across Africa every year, according to WHO.
impact.livesLostDesc: Deaths each year that could be prevented with early detection and timely treatment.
impact.earlyDetectionDesc: Many cancers can be prevented or treated successfully if caught early.

aboutSection.title: Building Stronger Cancer Care Systems
aboutSection.description: Cancer Care Africa Foundation (CanCAF) is a purpose-driven non-profit organization committed to strengthening cancer control systems across Africa.
aboutSection.missionText: To strengthen cancer control systems through capacity building, awareness, advocacy, and strategic partnerships.
